title: Monitor weather conditions
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Monitor weather conditions demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Interpret weather and climate information

pcs.text: Review weather and climate information and warnings to determine likely conditions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review weather and climate information and warnings to determine likely conditions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review weather and climate information and warnings to determine likely conditions.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the possible impacts of weather and climate on workplace activity.

pcs.text: Identify and review options for appropriate preventative actions

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and review options for appropriate preventative actions.
